name: Agent Design Experience Test
brief: Comprehensive test suite for validating the agent design experience including import, validation, and diagnostic capabilities.
description: The agent design experience test app provides extensive automated testing for the agent design experience. Includes unit tests for agent import/export operations, profile and permission set validation, diagnostic message generation, XML parsing, and agent lifecycle management. Features test coverage for error scenarios, warning conditions, successful operations, and edge cases to ensure reliable agent development workflows.
